author: F De Rivaz
name: Sophonics LoRA Int5 DeepMLP
blurb: Unlimited-compute non-record submission: start from a compact trained base model, quantize it to int5, then train rank-16 LoRA repair modules only on the deepest two MLP blocks. The merged repaired checkpoint scores 1.3390 BPB on full validation and 1.3411 BPB after uniform int8+zlib roundtrip, with a conservative total artifact size of 11,016,123 bytes.
